text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night, I find Director Akikawa growing turf
for the racecourse in her field.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no way one person could ever grow that
much turf by themselves... but with everyone's
help, it's another story!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans, Umamusume, and trainers alike all pitch in
to make the event happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This amazing turnout could only be made possible
by Director Akikawa's infectious love for
Umamusume.
